boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-AST-081 pending; STD-AST-081-P requires exact match

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. REL-AST-081 confirms the execution release covers AS-44 solvent, 18 liters, Facility R9, and PO-AST-081, but active cabinet and handler controls remain pending. STD-AST-081-P mandates an exact match for material, quantity, facility, PO, and hazard-control status before execution. The pending hazard controls leave the source boundary open, preventing closure.
open_blockers: 047-style abstract-field trap: hazard-control status is pending, not confirmed
